creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
"Th" is flagged as a spelling error because it is a misspelling found in FreeBSD documents.  I would say the best way to write that is Nth, distinguishing the N from the rest of it.  I'm hesitant to remove it from the list of misspelled words because a bare "th" is almost always a spelling error.  A good argument could be made for removing both it and "fr" on the basis that they are country codes.

In this case, I would still prefer the "Nth" form.
